name: prompt-enhancer
description: Chrome extension that enhances rough prompts into structured prompts on ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.

scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -R public/icons/ dist/icons/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup.html
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && NODE_ENV=development npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean && NODE_ENV=production npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
